Japan Trip 2024 — Itinerary Overview: This two-week itinerary covers Tokyo (5 nights), Kyoto (4 nights), Hiroshima/Miyajima day trip, Osaka (3 nights), and a final night in Hakone for Mt. Fuji views. The Japan Rail Pass (14-day) covers all Shinkansen travel between cities and is purchased before departure. Highlights include the Tsukiji Outer Market for breakfast sushi, a tea ceremony in Gion, the Fushimi Inari shrine at sunrise, Nishiki Market, and a day in Nara to feed the deer. Budget estimate is $3,800 per person excluding flights, based on mid-range accommodation and daily food budget of $60.
